chunk: Sparsh Shandilya is a fullstack developer skilled in MERN, Next.js, and TypeScript. He has strong experience in backend development using Node.js and Express.js.
Sparsh has also worked as a Software Developer Intern at Innov8Labs and as a Next.js Developer Intern at Web3ProjectLinks.
His technical stack includes MongoDB, PostgreSQL, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Apart from development, Sparsh has also contributed to organizing college cultural and sports fests as part of student societies.
He started web development in his first year of college and has built several projects including Versaile, Rest-ez, and Nexum.
He is passionate about system design, DevOps, and building scalable backend systems.
Sparsh has experience with real-time systems and has worked on collaborative editors with synchronized state and terminal integration.
Nexum is a real-time collaborative development platform that includes code editing, communication tools, version control, and built-in AI assistance.
In his free time, Sparsh enjoys watching anime, exploring new technologies, and writing technical blogs.
He is currently working on improving Nexum by adding AI-powered features and gamified collaboration tools.
